title: erodium absinthoides subsp. balcanicum
intro: Erodium absinthoides subsp. balcanicum is a subspecies of the annual plant Erodium absinthoides, commonly known as the Balkan filaree. This plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Erodium absinthoides subsp. balcanicum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial effects. Erodium absinthoides subsp. balcanicum can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
